steps.title: Match equal periods
steps.content: The text says each TRAPPIST-1 planet has an orbital period equal to its rotational period. The example must use table data for TRAPPIST-1e that show this equality.

steps.title: Reject mismatched examples
steps.content: Choice A uses 1.51 days and a shortest-period claim. Choice C uses 9.21 days and refers to TRAPPIST-1f. Choice D gives unequal periods by pairing 6.1 days with 0.92 days. The matching data give equal 6.1-day periods. The answer is B.
